# PassbackAI — interactive components schema (public mirror)

Automatic mirror of the public schema for [passbackai.com](https://passbackai.com) interactive components.

- `ask.md` — the full human/agent-readable spec (same as <https://passbackai.com/ask.md>)
- `schema.json` — JSON Schema for programmatic validation (same as <https://passbackai.com/schema.json>)

**Canonical home:** <https://passbackai.com/ask>. Do not edit here — changes are overwritten on the next sync.
